recalls.Description:
Auto World is recalling several models of its Deluxe Pit Kit slot cars due to a safety concern involving loose magnets that can pose an ingestion hazard to children. These slot cars are sold unassembled, with some models available painted or unpainted. Each package features the "Auto World" logo and details about the model on the front, while assembly instructions are provided on the back. The recalled kits contain two magnets that are not secured to the chassis before assembly, increasing the risk of ingestion if swallowed by children.

The recalled models include various styles, each identified by a model number and UPC code. Assembled versions of these slot cars do not carry the same risk and are not included in this recall. Consumers are urged to keep these unassembled kits away from children and follow the return process outlined by the manufacturer for a full refund.
recalls.Title: Recall of Auto World Deluxe Pit Kit Slot Cars Due to Ingestion Risk from Loose Magnets
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact Round 2 at 888-770-7120, available from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email deluxepitkit@realtimeresults.net. Additional details can be found online at http://autoworldstore.com/deluxepitkitrecall or by visiting http://autoworldstore.com and selecting "Deluxe Pit Kit Recall."

Retailers.Name: Available online at autoworldstore.com, protinkertoys.com, and hobbylobby.com, as well as in stores such as Hobby Lobby and various hobby shops nationwide. These products were sold from July 2023 through February 2024 for approximately $22.

Importers.Name: Round 2 LLC, of South Bend, Indiana

Hazards.Name: Loose magnets in unassembled slot cars pose a risk of ingestion, which can lead to serious health issues such as intestinal blockages or perforations.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should keep the recalled slot cars away from children and contact Round 2 for a prepaid return label to receive a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Auto World recalls Deluxe Pit Kit slot cars due to ingestion hazards from loose magnets. Learn how to return for a refund.
